seoTitle: Jaffa vs Jaggan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jaffa and Jaggan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jaffa and Jaggan.
heading: Jaffa vs Jaggan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jaffa, Queensland and Jaggan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jaggan has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Jaffa (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jaffa or Jaggan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jaffa has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Jaggan scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jaffa scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Jaggan scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jaffa or Jaggan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jaggan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
